lines.speaker: Garl
lines.text: Hello there. Don't see many people around here. The name's Garl.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey. What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Garl
lines.text: Exploring. Until that Nomad chap opened things up, this island was abandoned. Who knows what could be hiding here.

lines.speaker: Garl
lines.text: Well there's a dungeon on the east side of the island. I haven't gone too far in though. There's also a tower to the north west, near my camp.

lines.speaker: Garl
lines.text: There's no shortage of resources either. Though there's not really any way to process them. I tried to build a spinning wheel and a pottery wheel myself, but they broke.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You could really live off the land here. I can think of worse places to do so.

lines.speaker: Garl
lines.text: Indeed. It's all very peaceful. And yet...

lines.speaker: Garl
lines.text: I don't know. Something just seems amiss. There's something sinister about this place. I just don't really know what.

lines.speaker: Garl
lines.text: You're probably right. Anyway, I'll let you get on. All the best.
